citation: MGIC Rate Card 'Standard MI' BPMI (form 71-43345 series, effective 2024-03-04), pmi_capped_fallback row -> 0.0078 (LTV exactly 0.80 falls THROUGH per exclusive-lower boundary convention)
comment: Hand-calc: fico=720, ltv=Decimal('0.80') -> NO row matches (ltv_min=0.80 is EXCLUSIVE per PATTERNS Boundary Convention Divergence; the first row covers 0.80 < ltv <= 0.85) -> capped fallback at pmi_capped_fallback.annual_rate=0.0078.
